generated_oml:
instance HokuyoUst10LxLidar : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for 2D obstacle detection"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera for 3D spatial measurement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthImageDataTransmitted, VehicleStateDataTransmitted
]

instance Motor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor for propulsion control"
]

instance SteeringServo : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering Servo for directional adjustment"
]

instance LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUst10LxLidar
]

instance DepthImageDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data for obstacle detection"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2, Python38, Cpp
]

instance DepthImageData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "3D spatial measurement data from depth camera"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthImageDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2, Python38, Cpp
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed and steering angle metrics"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2, Python38, Cpp
]

instance ROS2 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Robot Operating System 2 for real-time communication and component integration"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for data processing and scripting"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance Cpp : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for high-performance data processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for simulation and model-based development"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance Jetpack50 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 for hardware acceleration and software stack"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance JetsonOrinNano : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano for edge computing"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService, DataMonitoringService
]

instance JetsonNXAntenna : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson NX antenna for communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance DataCollectingFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Data Collecting Functional Entity for raw sensor data acquisition"
]

instance PointCloudClusteringAndTrackingFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking Functional Entity for object detection and tracking"
]

instance DataPreProcessingFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Data Pre-Processing Functional Entity for data serialization and unit conversion"
]

instance DataTranslationComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Data Translation component for message type alignment and unit conversions"
]

instance ThreeDVisualizationFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "3D Visualization Functional Entity for real-time data display"
]

instance ControlPanelFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Control Panel Functional Entity for remote control of ADAS"
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data Monitoring service for real-time data viewing, saving, and report generation"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeDataViewing, DataSaving, ReportGeneration
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Computation Offloading service for Adaptive Cruise Control processing"
    DTDFVocab:provides LeadVehicleDetection, SpeedCalculation, ActuationCommands
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote Management service for configuring and controlling ADAS remotely"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACC, DisableACC, SetDesiredSpeed, SendEmergencyBraking
]

instance RealTimeDataViewing : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state data, projected driving path, and detected object tracks"
]

instance DataSaving : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Ability to save sensor and processed data for later analysis"
]

instance ReportGeneration : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Automatic generation of system performance reports"
]

instance LeadVehicleDetection : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of lead vehicle using sensor data"
]

instance SpeedCalculation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calculation of vehicle speed based on distance to lead vehicle"
]

instance EnableACC : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable Adaptive Cruise Control system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACC : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Disable Adaptive Cruise Control system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeed : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Set target speed for ACC"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SendEmergencyBraking : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Send emergency braking command"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ActuationCommands : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Commands sent to motor and steering servo for ACC control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance PhysicalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin environment containing physical components"
    base:contains HokuyoUst10LxLidar, IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera, Motor, SteeringServo
]

instance DigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Digital Twin environment containing data processing components"
    base:contains DataCollectingFE, PointCloudClusteringAndTrackingFE, DataPreProcessingFE, DataTranslationComponent
]

instance UserEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "User Entity environment for human interaction"
    base:contains ThreeDVisualizationFE, ControlPanelFE
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands generated by the ACC Controlling FE are serialized and translated via the Data Translation component, then transmitted over ROS2 for internal component communication and UDP over Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication to actuate motor and steering servo actuators."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The system requires 100 ms clock synchronization accuracy for computation offloading between physical and digital components due to hardware limitations, despite safety-critical vehicular standards mandating stricter synchronization (less than 100 ms) to ensure temporal consistency."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "An entity-based architecture mapped to ISO 23247 RA, where each entity (User, Digital Twin, Physical Twin) is deployed on dedicated hardware and coordinated via ROS2 packages and nodes. The Physical Twin Entity extends beyond standard OME to include general automotive functionality, ensuring seamless integration of sensors, actuators, and compute resources within the system."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication between software components occurs within a ROS2 network, while inter-entity communication uses UDP over Wi-Fi in the transport layer."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with ISO 23247:2021 standard, which includes four parts: Overview and general principles, Reference architecture (Part 2), Digital representation of physical manufacturing elements, and Information exchange. The standard specifies an entity-based reference architecture with Observable Manufacturing Elements (OME), Data Collection and Device Control Entity, Digital Twin Entity, and User Entity. Interoperability is supported through protocols such as OPC Unified Architecture for Functional Entity implementation."
]
